deviation_note: Miss. Code Ann. section 43-19-101(4): when the noncustodial parent's adjusted gross income is more than $100,000/yr or less than $10,000/yr, the court must make a written finding on whether applying these percentages is reasonable -- this is a required REVIEW, not an automatic cap or reduction, so this calculator applies the same percentage at any income level and does not model that written-finding requirement. This calculator does not model Mississippi's discretionary deviation criteria (Section 43-19-103: extraordinary expenses, shared parenting arrangements, seasonal income, etc.) or the adjustments available for court-ordered support of other children or other children living in the noncustodial parent's home (Section 43-19-101(3)(c)-(d)).
